<!--
  feature_request.md — GitHub issue template for enhancements. It pre-fills a new
  issue so proposals capture the problem, not just a solution. Frame the need
  first; that makes it easier to agree on the right fix.
-->

## Problem / motivation

<!-- What problem does this solve? What is painful or missing today? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What you would like to happen. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside. -->

## Surface

<!-- Which surface(s) this touches: backend / web / webview / android / infra / docs. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Mockups, links, related OSK tickets, or anything else that helps. -->
